problem_text_cn: 1078 质量$m$、半径$r$的匀质球置于倾角$\theta$的斜面底端，球心初速为零，绕过中心且平行于斜面的水平轴以角速度$\omega_0$旋转，球与斜面间摩擦因数$\mu>\tan\theta$。求球能上升的最大高度$h$。
problem_text_en: 1078 A homogeneous sphere of mass $m$ and radius $r$ is placed at the bottom of an inclined plane with an inclination angle $\theta$. The initial velocity of the center of the sphere is zero, and it rotates about a horizontal axis passing through the center and parallel to the inclined plane with an angular velocity $\omega_0$. The friction coefficient between the sphere and the inclined plane is $\mu>\tan\theta$. Find the maximum height $h$ that the sphere can rise to.
img_cn: 图1078_2：第一阶段（滑动摩擦加速上滑）受力分析
图1078_3：第二阶段（静摩擦纯滚减速）受力分析
img_en: Fig. 1078_1: Initial rotational state of the sphere
Fig. 1078_2: Force analysis of the first stage (sliding friction accelerating upward)
Fig. 1078_3: Force analysis of the second stage (static friction pure rolling deceleration)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】分两阶段分析：1. 滑动摩擦阶段：摩擦力向上，球心加速、角速度减速，直至达到纯滚条件$v_C=\omega r$，由牛顿定律和转动定律求此阶段的位移$l_1$；2. 纯滚减速阶段：摩擦力为向上的静摩擦，球心与角速度同步减速至零，由纯滚条件和动能定理求位移$l_2$；总高度$h=(l_1+l_2)\sin\theta$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Analyze in two stages: 1. Sliding friction stage: Friction acts upward, the center of the sphere accelerates and the angular velocity decelerates until the pure rolling condition $v_C=\omega r$ is reached. Find the displacement $l_1$ of this stage using Newton's laws and the rotational equation of motion; 2. Pure rolling deceleration stage: Friction is static friction upward, the center of the sphere and angular velocity decelerate to zero synchronously. Find the displacement $l_2$ using the pure rolling condition and the work-energy theorem; Total height $h=(l_1+l_2)\sin\theta$.
problem_answer: 球能上升的最大高度$\boldsymbol{h = \dfrac{2\omega_0^2 r^2 (\mu \cos\theta - \sin\theta)}{5(7\mu \cos\theta - 2\sin\theta)g}}$
